meta.title: Sweet Lab — Luxury Patisserie in Milan
meta.description: Artisan haute patisserie in the heart of Milan. Where science meets sweetness.

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

home.heroSubtitle: Artisan haute patisserie in the heart of Milan, where every creation is the result of precision, research and tradition.

manifesto.line2: We study ingredients, temperature and time.
manifesto.line3: Every dessert is a successful experiment.

home.creationsSubtitle: The masterpieces that define Sweet Lab
home.laboratoryText: Founded in 2018 by Elena Marchetti, trained at École Grégoire Ferrandi in Paris, Sweet Lab combines scientific rigor and artisan sensitivity in every creation.
home.visitSubtitle: We await you on Via della Spiga

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before your visit

about.title: About us
about.subtitle: The Sweet Lab story
about.heroText: A pastry laboratory where French precision meets Milanese soul.

timeline.2018: Elena Marchetti opens Sweet Lab on Via della Spiga after training in Paris.
timeline.2020: Introduction of the open kitchen and reservation-only tastings.
timeline.2022: Recognized as Milan's best artisan patisserie.
timeline.2024: Expansion of the seasonal line and collaborations with master chocolatiers.

ingredients.title: Ingredients
ingredients.text: AOP butter, Bourbon vanilla, Bronte pistachio and selected bean-to-bar chocolate.

precision.title: Precision
precision.text: Every recipe is calibrated to the gram, with thermal control and replicable processes.

tradition.title: Tradition
tradition.text: Classic techniques of great French patisserie, reinterpreted with contemporary sensitivity.

elena.name: Elena Marchetti
elena.bio: Trained in Paris, she leads Sweet Lab with scientific vision and artisan passion.

marco.name: Marco Vitale
marco.bio: Specialist in tempering and praliné, he curates the maison's chocolate line.

sofia.name: Sofia Laurent
sofia.bio: Welcomes guests and coordinates tastings and private events.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: We are at your service
contact.name: Name
contact.error: Unable to send your message. Please try again or call us.

reservations.title: Reservations
reservations.subtitle: Tastings and private events
reservations.intro: Book a guided tasting in our laboratory or a private event in the Sweet Lab salon.

reservations.success: Reservation received. We will contact you within 24 hours.
